description: A customer wants to close their savings account and transfer the balance to their checking account.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer and verify their request.
Check the savings account balance and transfer the full amount to the customer's checking account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully transfers the remaining balance.

nodes.task_description: Close the savings account and provide confirmation to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully closes the account and confirms the action.
